title: SkillsIndexSlice
description: Slice produced by the skills_index probe (Phase 2 Layer D). Indices the Planner queries (applies_to_tasks, applies_to_languages) plus body byte-offset anchors, three-key tier_counts, and per-file-error JSON round-trips. Bodies are NEVER opened by the probe; the loader (S2-01) records body_offset/body_size/body_blake3 once. Generated from src/codegenie/probes/layer_d/skills_index.py::SkillsIndexSlice (Pydantic model is the source of truth).

skills.description: Lexicographic-stable sorted list of IndexedSkill rows (by id).

tier_counts.description: Pre-de-duplication count of SKILL.md files discovered per tier. Always exactly the three keys (missing tier paths count as 0).

per_file_errors.description: JSON-dumps of the loader's discriminated SkillsLoadError union (SymlinkRefused | UnsafeYaml | FrontmatterUnterminated | SchemaViolation | IoFailure). Each item is a JSON string the consumer parses via json.loads.
